summary.en: Lygos engineers yeast and microbes to convert sugars into high-value industrial chemicals.
summary.zh: Lygos 改造酵母與微生物，將糖類轉化為高價值的工業化學品。

highlight.en: Founded in 2010, Lygos targets chemicals where biological production from sugar is cost-advantaged over conventional petrochemical methods.
highlight.zh: 成立於 2010 年，Lygos 鎖定那些以糖類進行生物製造、比傳統石化生產更具成本優勢的化學品。

summary.en: Chatfuel is a platform to easily build chatbots that engage audiences on Facebook Messenger.
summary.zh: Chatfuel 是一個能輕鬆打造聊天機器人、在 Facebook Messenger 上與受眾互動的平台。

highlight.en: Positioned as the largest Messenger bot platform, it powers sales, marketing, lead generation and support for brands like Adidas, T-Mobile and LEGO.
highlight.zh: 定位為最大的 Messenger 機器人平台，為 Adidas、T-Mobile、LEGO 等品牌驅動銷售、行銷、潛在客戶開發與客服。

summary.en: Petcube builds interactive pet cameras that let owners watch, talk to and play with pets remotely.
summary.zh: Petcube 打造互動式寵物攝影機，讓飼主能遠端觀看、對話並與寵物玩耍。

highlight.en: Founded in Kyiv in 2013 and Kickstarter-funded, Petcube added Play, Bites and a Care cloud video service, selling through Best Buy, Petco and Brookstone.
highlight.zh: 2013 年於基輔創立並透過 Kickstarter 募資，Petcube 推出 Play、Bites 及 Care 雲端錄影服務，並在 Best Buy、Petco 與 Brookstone 銷售。

summary.en: SOUNDBOKS makes what it calls the loudest battery-powered speaker on the market.
summary.zh: SOUNDBOKS 打造其稱為市面上最大聲的電池供電喇叭。

highlight.en: The Copenhagen hardware startup, founded in 2015, ran the most successful Danish Kickstarter campaign ever and ships across Europe and North America.
highlight.zh: 這家 2015 年創立的哥本哈根硬體新創，締造了丹麥史上最成功的 Kickstarter 募資活動，並銷往歐洲與北美。

summary.en: Cover was a mobile-first insurance platform that let users insure items by snapping a photo.
summary.zh: Cover 是一個行動優先的保險平台，讓用戶拍張照片就能為物品投保。

highlight.en: Launched in Toronto, the iOS and Android app partnered with insurers and brokers to insure vehicles, phones, pets, jewelry, homes and boats at good rates.
highlight.zh: 在多倫多推出的 iOS 與 Android 應用，與保險公司及經紀商合作，以具競爭力的費率為車輛、手機、寵物、珠寶、房屋與船隻投保。

summary.en: Thunkable is a no-code platform for building powerful native mobile apps via drag and drop.
summary.zh: Thunkable 是一個無程式碼平台，透過拖放方式打造功能強大的原生行動應用。

highlight.en: Born from MIT's App Inventor, Thunkable needs no dev suites or simulators—edits appear instantly on-device and apps publish straight to the app stores.
highlight.zh: 源自 MIT 的 App Inventor，Thunkable 無需開發套件或模擬器，編輯結果即時顯示在裝置上，應用可直接發佈到 Play Store 或 App Store。

summary.en: Lynks is an e-commerce company that makes high-demand products accessible in developing countries.
summary.zh: Lynks 是一家電商公司，讓開發中國家也能取得高需求的熱門商品。

highlight.en: Lynks focuses on bridging access gaps so consumers in developing markets can buy products that are otherwise hard to obtain.
highlight.zh: Lynks 專注於弭平取得落差，讓開發中市場的消費者能買到原本難以取得的商品。

summary.en: Stilt builds financial products for immigrants and infrastructure to launch credit products without a bank.
summary.zh: Stilt 為移民打造金融產品，並提供無需銀行擔保即可推出信貸產品的基礎架構。

highlight.en: Acquired by JG Wentworth, Stilt's Onbo APIs abstract licensing, compliance, underwriting, loan management, credit reporting and debt capital for credit issuers.
highlight.zh: 已被 JG Wentworth 收購，Stilt 的 Onbo API 為信貸發行方抽象化牌照、合規、核保、貸款管理、信用報告與債務資本。

summary.en: MineralSoft is a data management platform for managing oil and gas mineral rights and royalties.
summary.zh: MineralSoft 是管理石油與天然氣礦權及權利金的資料管理平台。

highlight.en: It pairs software with professional service for funds, family offices, individuals and advisors to track and maximize the value of oil and gas mineral assets.
highlight.zh: 它結合軟體與專業服務，協助基金、家族辦公室、個人與顧問追蹤並最大化石油天然氣礦產資產的價值。

summary.en: PocketSuite is an all-in-one business operating system for service businesses.
summary.zh: PocketSuite 是專為服務型企業打造的一站式商業營運系統。

highlight.en: For over a decade its desktop and mobile cloud has handled bookings, payments and client communication for independent pros and small businesses.
highlight.zh: 十多年來，其桌面與行動雲端平台為獨立專業人士、小型企業與多據點品牌處理預約、收款與客戶溝通。

summary.en: GoLorry is a mobile marketplace for inter-city trucking in India.
summary.zh: GoLorry 是印度跨城市貨運的行動媒合平台。

highlight.en: Founded in 2015, GoLorry provides transport and logistics services with operations in California and Hyderabad.
highlight.zh: 成立於 2015 年，GoLorry 提供運輸與物流服務，營運據點橫跨加州與海得拉巴。

summary.en: Qvin uses menstrual blood as a non-invasive source for laboratory-grade blood testing.
summary.zh: Qvin 以經血作為非侵入式來源，進行實驗室等級的血液檢測。

highlight.en: Started in 2014 by Dr. Sara Naseri and Søren Therkelsen, Qvin claims to be the first to scientifically prove period blood can reveal health information.
highlight.zh: 由 Sara Naseri 醫師與 Søren Therkelsen 於 2014 年創立，Qvin 宣稱是首家科學證明經血可揭示關鍵健康資訊的公司。

summary.en: AlphaFlow was a tech-driven investment manager offering managed portfolios of real estate loans.
summary.zh: AlphaFlow 是一家技術驅動的投資管理公司，提供以房地產貸款組成的託管投資組合。

highlight.en: Founded in 2015, it used software and data analytics to open the $75 billion fix-and-flip lending market to institutional and smaller investors via TITAN.
highlight.zh: 成立於 2015 年，它透過 TITAN 平台運用軟體與資料分析，將 750 億美元的整修轉售貸款市場向機構與小型投資者開放。

summary.en: Unima built fast, low-cost diagnostics for real-time disease surveillance at the point of care.
summary.zh: Unima 打造快速、低成本的診斷工具，用於照護現場的即時疾病監測。

highlight.en: Its test let anyone diagnose disease right where the patient is, without lab equipment, returning results in 15 minutes at very low cost.
highlight.zh: 其檢測讓任何人都能在病患所在地直接診斷疾病，無需實驗室設備，15 分鐘內以極低成本得出結果。

summary.en: Plato is a mentorship platform that helps engineering and product leaders become better managers.
summary.zh: Plato 是一個導師媒合平台，協助工程與產品主管成為更優秀的管理者。

highlight.en: Through video one-on-ones and AMAs with experienced leaders from Google, Netflix, Lyft and Box, Plato helps managers resolve tough situations in real time.
highlight.zh: 透過與 Google、Netflix、Lyft、Box 等資深主管的視訊一對一與 AMA 問答，Plato 協助管理者即時化解棘手難題。

summary.en: Bonsai is all-in-one back-office software for small businesses and the self-employed.
summary.zh: Bonsai 是一套專為小型企業與自由工作者打造的一站式後勤辦公軟體。

highlight.en: Trusted by 500,000+ small businesses worldwide, Bonsai integrates client management, work delivery, getting paid on time and finance tracking in one place.
highlight.zh: 獲全球逾 50 萬家小型企業信賴，Bonsai 將客戶管理、交付工作、準時收款與財務追蹤整合於同一處。

summary.en: flexEngage turns retailers' post-purchase communications like receipts into personalized marketing.
summary.zh: flexEngage 將零售商收據等購買後的溝通內容轉化為個人化行銷媒介。

highlight.en: It gives retailers Amazon-like software for receipts and post-purchase messages, building a data network of 300M transactions and 47M consumer profiles.
highlight.zh: 它為零售商提供 Amazon 等級的收據與購買後訊息軟體，建立涵蓋 3 億筆交易與 4,700 萬份消費者輪廓的資料網絡。

summary.en: Revl offers AI-edited video souvenirs as a service, built around its smart action camera.
summary.zh: Revl 以 AI 自動剪輯的影片紀念品作為服務，並圍繞其智慧運動攝影機打造。

highlight.en: Founded in 2015 in San Francisco, Revl developed the Arc smart action camera with frogVentures, Sony and Ambarella, plus engineers from NASA, HP and Sikorsky.
highlight.zh: 2015 年於舊金山創立，Revl 與 frogVentures、Sony、Ambarella 及來自 NASA、HP、Sikorsky 的工程師共同開發 Arc 智慧運動攝影機。

summary.en: WorldCover was a funding platform providing global insurance, starting with crop insurance.
summary.zh: WorldCover 是一個提供全球保險的資金平台，從農作物保險起步。

highlight.en: Its peer-to-peer model connected investors seeking uncorrelated returns with smallholder farmers in developing countries needing crop insurance.
highlight.zh: 其點對點模式將尋求非相關報酬的投資者，與開發中國家需要天災作物保險的小農連結起來。

summary.en: Copia is a for-profit technology company that tackles food waste by redistributing surplus food.
summary.zh: Copia 是一家以營利為導向的科技公司，透過重新分配剩食來解決食物浪費。

highlight.en: Treating hunger as a logistics problem, Copia lets businesses request surplus-food pickups, matches and delivers them to nonprofits, and unlocks tax savings.
highlight.zh: Copia 將飢餓視為物流問題，讓企業申請剩食取件，媒合並配送給非營利組織，同時釋放稅務節省。

summary.en: Castle blocks bots and bad behavior to stop account takeovers and fake accounts.
summary.zh: Castle 阻擋機器人與惡意行為，遏止帳號盜用與假帳號。

highlight.en: It instantly stops automated and human-originated account takeovers, fake accounts and any behavior that violates a platform's policies.
highlight.zh: 它能即時遏止自動化與人為的帳號盜用、假帳號，以及任何違反平台政策的行為。

summary.en: MagicBus makes vanpooling simple with software for transit agencies and employers.
summary.zh: MagicBus 以服務交通機構與雇主的軟體，讓共乘廂型車變得簡單。

highlight.en: Aiming to take cars off the road, its SaaS manages vanpool fleets, tracks open seats in real time, and lets riders book those seats through an app.
highlight.zh: 以減少道路車輛為目標，其 SaaS 管理共乘廂型車隊、即時追蹤空位，並讓乘客透過應用程式預訂座位。

summary.en: MailTime is a mobile email client that makes email as quick and easy as text messaging.
summary.zh: MailTime 是一款行動電子郵件客戶端，讓寫信像傳簡訊一樣快速簡單。

highlight.en: Beyond its texting-style email messenger, MailTime AI drafts and proofreads emails using generative AI.
highlight.zh: 除了訊息式的電郵介面，MailTime AI 還運用生成式 AI 來草擬與校對郵件。

summary.en: Modal builds digital commerce software for the world's largest auto retailers and brands.
summary.zh: Modal 為全球最大的汽車零售商與品牌打造數位商務軟體。

highlight.en: Formerly Drive Motors and founded in 2015 in San Francisco, Modal coordinated many technologies to drive billions of dollars in auto transaction volume yearly.
highlight.zh: 前身為 Drive Motors、2015 年於舊金山創立，Modal 整合多項技術，每年驅動數十億美元的汽車交易量。

summary.en: Pulpix offers binge-watching and personalized video technology for online video platforms.
summary.zh: Pulpix 為線上影音平台提供連續觀看與個人化影片推薦技術。

highlight.en: Pulpix leverages artificial intelligence to deliver a personalized video experience that keeps viewers engaged on online video platforms.
highlight.zh: Pulpix 運用人工智慧打造個人化的觀影體驗，讓觀眾持續沉浸於線上影音平台。

summary.en: Georgette Packaging makes carbon-neutral, branded packaging for ambitious businesses.
summary.zh: Georgette Packaging 為有抱負的企業製作碳中和的品牌包裝。

highlight.en: It makes it easy to design and manufacture conscientious, branded packaging for businesses that want a more sustainable option.
highlight.zh: 它讓企業能輕鬆設計與生產兼顧責任的品牌包裝，提供更永續的選擇。

summary.en: Pathmind applied deep reinforcement learning to industrial simulations to improve operations.
summary.zh: Pathmind 將深度強化學習應用於工業模擬，以提升營運表現。

highlight.en: It helped industrial engineers and modelers gain 10-20% performance in operations, supply chains and mining by deploying decision policies into digital twins.
highlight.zh: 它協助工業工程師與建模人員，透過將決策策略部署到數位分身，在營運、供應鏈與採礦中取得 10-20% 的效能提升。

summary.en: Hingeto is a B2B marketplace that connects inventory to online stores.
summary.zh: Hingeto 是一個將庫存連結至線上商店的 B2B 市集。

highlight.en: Its platform lets fashion brands and influencers sell past and future products with zero inventory risk, backed by YC and Kapor Capital.
highlight.zh: 其平台讓時尚品牌與網紅在零庫存風險下銷售過往與未來商品，並獲 YC、Kapor Capital 及含 Andrew Iguodala 在內的天使投資人支持。

summary.en: Mio powers seamless messaging between workplace chat apps like Slack, Teams and Webex.
summary.zh: Mio 讓 Slack、Teams、Webex 等職場聊天工具之間能無縫互通訊息。

highlight.en: Founded in 2015 in Austin, Mio raised $12M from investors including Goldcrest Capital, Khosla Ventures and Y Combinator to sync teams across chat platforms.
highlight.zh: 2015 年於奧斯汀創立，Mio 募得 1,200 萬美元，投資方包括 Goldcrest Capital、Khosla Ventures 與 Y Combinator，跨平台同步團隊溝通。

summary.en: Gigwell is building the operating system for the concert and live events industry.
summary.zh: Gigwell 正為演唱會與現場活動產業打造營運系統。

highlight.en: Trusted by 100,000+ artists and venues, Gigwell has facilitated over $5 billion in bookings, replacing scattered spreadsheets and PDFs with one booking hub.
highlight.zh: 獲逾 10 萬名藝人與場館信賴，Gigwell 已促成超過 50 億美元的預約，以單一預訂中心取代零散的試算表與 PDF。

summary.en: mRelief is a nonprofit web and text platform that helps Americans sign up for SNAP benefits.
summary.zh: mRelief 是一個非營利的網頁與簡訊平台，協助美國民眾申請 SNAP 食物補助。

highlight.en: Built on USDA datasets, mRelief lets people text 74544 to check likely SNAP eligibility across all 50 states and DC.
highlight.zh: 建立於 USDA 資料集之上，mRelief 讓民眾傳簡訊至 74544，即可查詢在全美 50 州與華府的 SNAP 申請資格。

summary.en: NetBeez is a digital experience monitoring platform that watches networks from the end-user's view.
summary.zh: NetBeez 是一個數位體驗監控平台，從終端使用者的視角觀測網路。

highlight.en: It lets IT teams support remote users by quickly troubleshooting communication and network performance issues as experienced from the user's perspective.
highlight.zh: 它讓 IT 團隊以使用者實際感受的視角，快速排除溝通與網路效能問題，從而支援遠端使用者。

summary.en: Compgun was sales commission software designed to grow revenue and modernize commission management.
summary.zh: Compgun 是一款銷售佣金軟體，旨在帶動營收成長並讓佣金管理現代化。

highlight.en: Built on the idea that commissions are a sales org's biggest lever and expense, Compgun replaced Excel-and-email tracking with real-time insight for every rep.
highlight.zh: 基於佣金既是銷售組織最大槓桿也是最大支出的理念，Compgun 以即時績效洞察取代 Excel 與電郵追蹤，造福每位業務。

summary.en: VINEBOX is a premium wine-by-the-glass subscription delivered in single-serving tubes.
summary.zh: VINEBOX 是一項以單杯試管裝配送的精選葡萄酒訂閱服務。

highlight.en: Each month subscribers receive three single-serving tubes of curated wine with easy tasting notes and a searchable history of every wine they've tried.
highlight.zh: 訂閱者每月收到三支由團隊精選的單杯試管裝葡萄酒，附上易懂的品飲筆記與可查詢的歷史品酒紀錄。

summary.en: Able Health helps physician organizations get paid more by managing value-based care programs.
summary.zh: Able Health 透過管理價值導向照護計畫，協助醫師組織獲得更高給付。

highlight.en: It calculates HEDIS and Medicare measures and engages clinicians and health plans, simplifying the administration of value-based reimbursement programs.
highlight.zh: 它計算 HEDIS 與 Medicare 指標並協調臨床醫師與健保計畫，簡化價值導向給付計畫的行政管理。

summary.en: Deako makes beautiful, modular connected light switches for affordable smart lighting.
summary.zh: Deako 打造美觀的模組化連網燈具開關，提供平價的智慧照明。

highlight.en: Its modular switch lets homeowners upgrade smart lighting in minutes without cutting power, earning TecHome Builder's #1 Smart Lighting Control System ranking.
highlight.zh: 其模組化開關讓屋主在不斷電的情況下幾分鐘內升級智慧照明，並獲 TecHome Builder 評為第一名的智慧照明控制系統。

summary.en: Goodybag is an online tool for companies to order catering from restaurants for the office.
summary.zh: Goodybag 是一個讓企業向餐廳訂購辦公室外燴的線上工具。

highlight.en: Businesses search restaurants and have food delivered to meetings, while restaurants list catering menus with no startup or monthly fees.
highlight.zh: 企業可搜尋餐廳並將餐點送到會議，餐廳則能免起始與月費刊登外燴菜單，並自訂配送費與範圍。

summary.en: Open Motors builds open, modular electric vehicle platforms for carmakers and mobility startups.
summary.zh: Open Motors 為車廠與行動新創打造開放、模組化的電動車平台。

highlight.en: Formerly OSVehicle, its reference platforms can save makers up to two years of R&D, and it is developing EDIT, a modular white-label self-driving vehicle.
highlight.zh: 前身為 OSVehicle，其參考平台可為車廠省下多達兩年的研發時間，並正開發模組化的白牌自駕車 EDIT。

summary.en: Castle managed rental homes for landlords using automation and on-demand labor.
summary.zh: Castle 運用自動化與隨需人力，為房東管理出租房屋。

highlight.en: It found tenants, collected rent and coordinated maintenance online, offering transparency and cost savings versus traditional property managers.
highlight.zh: 它在線上招租、收租並協調維修，相較傳統物業管理，在全美 4,300 萬個出租單位市場中提供透明度與成本節省。

summary.en: Elucify was an API that plugged into your CRM to automatically clean and enrich sales data.
summary.zh: Elucify 是一個接入 CRM 的 API，可自動清理並補全銷售資料。

highlight.en: Built on the belief that good data underpins effective sales teams, Elucify was acquired by Circleback in 2018.
highlight.zh: 基於良好資料是高效銷售團隊基礎的理念，Elucify 於 2018 年被 Circleback 收購。

summary.en: Nova uses AI to identify next best actions across a sales pipeline so sellers focus where it matters.
summary.zh: Nova 運用 AI 找出銷售漏斗中的下一步最佳行動，讓業務專注於最關鍵之處。

highlight.en: By surfacing next best actions across the entire pipeline, Nova helps sellers avoid dropped balls and funnel leakage while clarifying each team member's role.
highlight.zh: 透過點出整條銷售漏斗中的最佳行動，Nova 協助業務避免遺漏與漏斗流失，並釐清每位團隊成員的角色。

summary.en: Zenysis builds data integration software that helps governments analyze all their data in one place.
summary.zh: Zenysis 打造資料整合軟體，協助政府在同一處分析所有資料。

highlight.en: When governments in developing countries face pandemics, humanitarian crises or disasters, Zenysis puts actionable insights from their data at their fingertips.
highlight.zh: 當開發中國家政府面臨疫情、人道危機或天災時，Zenysis 讓他們能即時掌握來自資料的可行洞察。

summary.en: LendEDU is a marketplace and comparison site for consumer financial products.
summary.zh: LendEDU 是一個消費者金融產品的市集與比較網站。

highlight.en: Co-founded in 2014, it brings transparency to student, personal and auto lending, banking and credit cards, and is featured by the WSJ, NYT and CNBC.
highlight.zh: 成立於 2014 年，它為學貸、個人貸款、車貸、銀行與信用卡市場帶來透明度，並獲華爾街日報、紐約時報、CNBC 與彭博報導。

summary.en: Wakie is a social app for phone calls where people express themselves and make real friends.
summary.zh: Wakie 是一款以語音通話為核心的社交應用，讓人們表達自我並結交真實朋友。

highlight.en: Users make millions of calls and send hundreds of millions of messages each month, on topics from language practice to mental health to personal life.
highlight.zh: 用戶每月撥打數百萬通電話、發送數億則訊息，話題涵蓋語言練習、心理健康到個人生活。

summary.en: iSono Health offers an AI-powered platform for accessible, personalized breast health monitoring.
summary.zh: iSono Health 提供 AI 驅動的平台，實現可近、個人化的乳房健康監測。

highlight.en: Its patented compact scanner captures a 3D image of the whole breast in one minute, sending data to the cloud where machine learning flags abnormal masses.
highlight.zh: 其專利的小型掃描器可在一分鐘內擷取整個乳房的 3D 影像，並將資料傳至雲端，由機器學習標示異常腫塊。

summary.en: Carbic uses ultrasonics and machine learning to analyze fluid behavior in infrastructure pipes.
summary.zh: Carbic 運用超音波與機器學習，分析基礎設施管線中的流體行為。

highlight.en: Its lightweight sensors stream ultrasonic data over cellular and satellite, combining physics, signal processing and anomaly detection to cut spills and theft.
highlight.zh: 其輕量感測器透過蜂巢與衛星傳輸超音波資料，結合物理、訊號處理與異常偵測，以減少洩漏與盜竊。

summary.en: Loop Genomics develops novel long-read DNA sequencing technology.
summary.zh: Loop Genomics 開發創新的長讀長 DNA 定序技術。

highlight.en: Its platform transforms standard short-read DNA sequencers into long-read machines for research and clinical applications.
highlight.zh: 其平台能將標準的短讀長 DNA 定序儀轉化為長讀長機器，用於研究與臨床應用。

summary.en: DevColor is a nonprofit giving Black software engineers the support they need to advance in tech.
summary.zh: DevColor 是一個非營利組織，為黑人軟體工程師提供在科技業晉升所需的支援。

highlight.en: Through mentorship, goal setting and events, dev/color supports Black engineers from college to industry and into leadership roles.
highlight.zh: 透過導師制、目標設定與活動，dev/color 從大學到職場、再到領導職位，全程支持黑人工程師。

summary.en: Pave analyzes Google Analytics and marketing data with AI and sends actionable reports.
summary.zh: Pave 以 AI 分析 Google Analytics 與行銷資料，並寄送可行動的報告。

highlight.en: Its data-science algorithm turns Google Analytics data into actionable insights and reports, with users including Four Seasons Private Residences and Scribd.
highlight.zh: 其資料科學演算法將 Google Analytics 資料轉化為可行動的洞察與報告，用戶包括 Four Seasons Private Residences 與 Scribd。

summary.en: Quilt manages data like code so companies can experiment faster.
summary.zh: Quilt 將資料像程式碼一樣管理，讓企業能更快進行實驗。

highlight.en: Treating S3 as git for data, Quilt offers a Python client, a web catalog for browsing and visualizing S3, and a CloudFormation backend for compute and identity.
highlight.zh: Quilt 將 S3 視為「資料版的 git」，提供 Python 客戶端、瀏覽與視覺化 S3 的網頁目錄，以及處理運算與身分的 CloudFormation 後端。

summary.en: Stealth Worker connects companies with vetted information security, compliance and privacy contractors.
summary.zh: Stealth Worker 為企業媒合經審核的資安、合規與隱私約聘人才。

highlight.en: It offers hundreds of qualified contractors in information security, cloud security, privacy and compliance, including GDPR, at competitive hourly rates.
highlight.zh: 它以具競爭力的時薪，提供數百名在資安、雲端安全、隱私與合規（含 GDPR）領域具資格的約聘人員。

summary.en: InnoVein develops a replacement valve for veins to cure intractable leg wounds.
summary.zh: InnoVein 開發靜脈瓣膜置換裝置，用以治癒難治的腿部傷口。

highlight.en: InnoVein targets chronic, hard-to-heal leg wounds with a prosthetic venous valve as its core therapeutic approach.
highlight.zh: InnoVein 以人工靜脈瓣膜作為核心治療方式，鎖定慢性且難以癒合的腿部傷口。

summary.en: Index maps the world's professional relationships to enable warm introductions.
summary.zh: Index 繪製全球職場人脈關係圖，以促成溫情引薦。

highlight.en: It combines public information about people with private relationship data to reveal who knows whom and how well, enabling warm introductions.
highlight.zh: 它結合人物的公開資訊與私人關係資料，揭示誰認識誰、交情多深，協助用戶取得來自同事的引薦。

summary.en: Algoriz was an AI platform that let users build trading algorithms by typing strategies in plain English.
summary.zh: Algoriz 是一個 AI 平台，讓用戶用純英文輸入策略即可建立交易演算法。

highlight.en: Backed by Y Combinator, Algoriz turned strategies written in English into algorithmic trading without requiring users to write code.
highlight.zh: 獲 Y Combinator 支持，Algoriz 將以英文撰寫的策略轉化為演算法交易，用戶無需編寫程式碼。

summary.en: Meter Feeder helps fleets find and pay parking tickets to stay compliant.
summary.zh: Meter Feeder 協助車隊查找並繳付停車罰單，以維持合規。

highlight.en: It keeps fleets of thousands of vehicles across many cities compliant, since one bootable car in NYC can put all of an owner's registered vehicles at risk.
highlight.zh: 由於在紐約市一輛可被上鎖的車就可能波及車主所有登記車輛，它讓橫跨數千城市、數千輛車的車隊保持合規。

summary.en: Monthli is a SaaS platform and marketplace for running homeowner association operations.
summary.zh: Monthli 是一個用於營運住戶協會（HOA）事務的 SaaS 平台與市集。

highlight.en: Billed as the first marketplace for homeowner associations, Monthli makes HOA operations simpler to run.
highlight.zh: 標榜為首個住戶協會市集，Monthli 讓 HOA 的營運更易於進行。

summary.en: UroDev Medical builds connected devices to improve life for people with spinal cord injury and disease.
summary.zh: UroDev Medical 打造連網醫療裝置，改善脊髓損傷與疾病患者的生活品質。

highlight.en: Operating as Spinal Singularity, its first product, the Connected Catheter, aims to transform how people manage neurogenic bladder and urinary incontinence.
highlight.zh: 以 Spinal Singularity 之名營運，其首款產品 Connected Catheter 旨在改變人們管理神經性膀胱與尿失禁的方式。

summary.en: Chillabit was a live feed of funny content and stories shared by students.
summary.zh: Chillabit 是一個由學生分享趣味內容與故事的即時動態牆。

highlight.en: Pitched as the best way to procrastinate, students shared everything from interesting thoughts and questions to hilarious stories about the people around them.
highlight.zh: 標榜為最佳的拖延方式，學生在上面分享從有趣想法、問題到周遭人物的爆笑故事。

summary.en: Netomi offers self-driving customer care powered by artificial intelligence.
summary.zh: Netomi 提供由人工智慧驅動的自動駕駛式客戶服務。

highlight.en: Backed by Y Combinator, Index Ventures, Jeffrey Katzenberg and Greg Brockman, Netomi builds AI to solve critical service problems for the largest brands.
highlight.zh: 獲 Y Combinator、Index Ventures、Jeffrey Katzenberg 與 Greg Brockman 支持，Netomi 打造 AI 為全球最大品牌解決關鍵的客服問題。

summary.en: Magic Instruments makes a high-tech guitar that is easier and more inspiring to play.
summary.zh: Magic Instruments 打造一款高科技吉他，讓彈奏更容易也更具啟發。

highlight.en: The MI Guitar (YC W2016, Highway1 F2015) uses an intuitive fretboard UI and a mobile app so anyone can pick it up and play favorite songs instantly.
highlight.zh: MI Guitar（YC W2016、Highway1 F2015）採用直覺的指板介面與行動應用，讓任何人拿起就能立即彈奏喜愛的歌曲。

summary.en: Toymail makes connected toys that let children and family exchange two-way voice messages.
summary.zh: Toymail 打造連網玩具，讓孩童與家人能雙向交換語音訊息。

highlight.en: Funded by Amazon and Verizon, its WiFi 'Talkies' plush toys let kids message phones and other Talkies, with voice filtering for safe play on or offline.
highlight.zh: 獲 Amazon 與 Verizon 投資，其 WiFi「Talkies」絨毛玩具讓孩子能傳訊給手機與其他 Talkies，並內建語音過濾，可在連線或離線下安全玩耍。

summary.en: DoseDr is a mobile app that helps diabetes patients adjust their insulin doses between doctor visits.
summary.zh: DoseDr 是一款行動應用，協助糖尿病患者在回診之間調整胰島素劑量。

highlight.en: The free app connects patients to a doctor who can help immediately when an issue arises, no appointment needed, giving better control between visits.
highlight.zh: 這款免費應用讓患者連結到醫師，問題一出現便能即時獲得協助、無需預約，在回診之間提供更好的病情控制。

summary.en: Luminist Labs built a diagnostic platform for early detection of liver disease.
summary.zh: Luminist Labs 打造用於早期偵測肝臟疾病的診斷平台。

highlight.en: It developed a non-invasive test for early detection and staging of liver fibrosis and NASH, and was acquired by DiscernDx in 2020.
highlight.zh: 它開發了用於早期偵測與分期肝纖維化及 NASH 的非侵入式檢測，並於 2020 年被 DiscernDx 收購。

summary.en: Enflux makes motion-capture clothing for injury prevention and broader fitness and VR uses.
summary.zh: Enflux 打造用於預防運動傷害，並延伸至健身與 VR 的動作捕捉服飾。

highlight.en: Enflux brings motion-capture clothing to the masses as a platform with an open API, serving VR, fitness and health, with customers like Hasbro and Jim Henson.
highlight.zh: Enflux 以具開放 API 的平台將動作捕捉服飾普及化，服務 VR、健身與健康領域，客戶包括 Hasbro 與 Jim Henson 公司。

summary.en: Start Closing is a project and customer tracking tool for the restoration roofing industry.
summary.zh: Start Closing 是一款專為修復型屋頂產業打造的專案與客戶追蹤工具。

highlight.en: It changes how homeowners and contractors interact, giving contractors transparency, efficiency and accountability throughout the restoration claim process.
highlight.zh: 它改變屋主與承包商的互動方式，讓承包商在整個修復理賠流程中獲得透明度、內部效率與當責性。

summary.en: ConstructVR was the simplest way for businesses to test, manage and deploy VR and AR apps at scale.
summary.zh: ConstructVR 是企業大規模測試、管理與部署 VR 與 AR 應用的最簡便方式。

highlight.en: It focused on letting businesses manage and deploy virtual and augmented reality applications at scale through one streamlined system.
highlight.zh: 它專注於讓企業透過單一精簡系統，大規模管理與部署虛擬實境與擴增實境應用。

summary.en: Interstate Analytics provides multi-touch marketing analytics to help marketers spend smarter.
summary.zh: Interstate Analytics 提供多點觸及行銷分析，協助行銷人更聰明地配置預算。

highlight.en: Founded in 2015, it centralizes visit, conversion and spend data and applies attribution models across touchpoints for clients like Everlane.
highlight.zh: 成立於 2015 年，它集中造訪、轉換與支出資料，並對所有觸點套用歸因模型，客戶包括 Everlane 與 Outdoor Voices。

summary.en: Patchwork Security delivers security patch notifications for servers after you build and deploy.
summary.zh: Patchwork Security 在你建置與部署後，為伺服器提供安全更新通知。

highlight.en: It takes what its founders know as security engineers, automates it, and makes server patching easy for everyone to use.
highlight.zh: 它把創辦人身為資安工程師的知識自動化，讓任何人都能輕鬆完成伺服器修補。

summary.en: Poppy made it easy for parents to find high-quality, vetted childcare on demand.
summary.zh: Poppy 讓家長能輕鬆找到高品質、經審核的隨需托育服務。

highlight.en: Poppy set families up with a team of vetted sitters, so parents could simply text when they needed care and stop worrying about being stuck without one.
highlight.zh: Poppy 為家庭配對一組經審核的保母，家長只要傳訊就能找到照護，不再擔心臨時找不到人。

summary.en: Anchor Health modernizes home health care agencies with software, hardware and operating solutions.
summary.zh: Anchor Health 以軟體、硬體與營運方案，讓居家照護機構現代化。

highlight.en: It provides software, hardware and operating solutions tailored to distributed health care networks and providers.
highlight.zh: 它為分散式的照護網絡與服務提供者，提供量身打造的軟體、硬體與營運方案。

summary.en: HistoWiz accelerates histopathology for cancer research with a web-based platform.
summary.zh: HistoWiz 以網頁平台加速癌症研究的組織病理學流程。

highlight.en: By mailing in specimens, labs get fast global access to digital whole-slide images, collaboration tools and expert pathology, freeing scientists to analyze.
highlight.zh: 研究室寄送檢體後，即可快速取得全球可用的數位全玻片影像、協作工具與病理專家，讓科學家專注分析而非切片。

summary.en: Landed offers white-labeled shared-appreciation down payment programs through employers.
summary.zh: Landed 透過雇主提供白牌的「增值共享」頭期款方案。

highlight.en: It helps employers increase homeownership access for staff via shared appreciation, creating a self-renewing pool of capital that recycles as buyers exit.
highlight.zh: 它協助雇主透過增值共享提升員工的購屋機會，形成一個隨買家退出而循環再生的資金池。

summary.en: TRAC is an end-to-end timing solution for athletic events of any scale.
summary.zh: TRAC 是適用於各種規模運動賽事的端到端計時解決方案。

highlight.en: Based in Chicago, it uses RFID, cellular data and app-based software to deliver precise, immediate timing for coaches and athletes in time-based sports.
highlight.zh: 總部位於芝加哥，它運用 RFID、蜂巢資料傳輸與應用程式軟體，為計時類運動的教練與選手提供精準、即時的成績。

summary.en: Envyl enabled fast, reliable and cost-effective peer-to-peer international delivery.
summary.zh: Envyl 提供快速、可靠且具成本效益的點對點國際遞送。

highlight.en: Envyl connected people for affordable, fast international peer-to-peer delivery of goods.
highlight.zh: Envyl 串連人們，提供平價、快速的點對點國際商品遞送。

summary.en: Real Artists makes a fast, native issue tracker for software projects.
summary.zh: Real Artists 為軟體專案打造快速的原生問題追蹤工具。

highlight.en: Real Artists focuses on speed and a native experience for tracking issues across software projects.
highlight.zh: Real Artists 專注於速度與原生體驗，協助追蹤軟體專案中的各項問題。

summary.en: Restocks lets users buy sneakers and streetwear and get instant restock and release alerts.
summary.zh: Restocks 讓用戶購買球鞋與街頭潮服，並即時收到補貨與發售通知。

highlight.en: Founded in 2015, the app sends instant notifications for new releases, restocks and price drops, letting users check stock and buy without leaving the app.
highlight.zh: 成立於 2015 年，這款應用即時推播新品、補貨與降價通知，讓用戶不離開 App 就能查庫存並下單。

summary.en: StrongIntro helps recruiters turn their whole company into a source of candidate referrals.
summary.zh: StrongIntro 協助招募人員把整間公司變成候選人推薦的來源。

highlight.en: It taps into existing employees' networks using a combined software and human-centric approach to help companies hire thoughtfully.
highlight.zh: 它以結合軟體與人本服務的方式，挖掘現有員工的人脈網絡，協助公司審慎地招募人才。

summary.en: Streamup was a live-streaming community centered on music.
summary.zh: Streamup 是一個以音樂為核心的直播社群。

highlight.en: It made live streaming music videos fun, letting users join a community to watch shows and chat with the musicians they love.
highlight.zh: 它讓直播音樂影片變得有趣，讓用戶加入社群觀看演出，並與喜愛的音樂人互動聊天。

summary.en: PhysioHealth was an enterprise health benefits platform that rewarded employees for healthy living.
summary.zh: PhysioHealth 是一個企業健康福利平台，獎勵員工維持健康的生活方式。

highlight.en: Its customized wellness platform claimed 5x the engagement of other corporate programs while lowering employers' healthcare costs.
highlight.zh: 其客製化健康平台宣稱參與度達其他企業計畫的五倍，同時降低雇主的醫療成本。

summary.en: Kip Health combines in-person therapy with a private app for high-quality care.
summary.zh: Kip Health 結合面對面心理治療與私密應用程式，提供高品質的照護。

highlight.en: Patients meet a therapist in person, then share daily thoughts via Kip's private app between sessions, using a science-backed, results-driven approach.
highlight.zh: 患者與治療師面對面會談，並在療程間透過 Kip 的私密應用分享日常感受，採用以科學為本、重視成效的方法。

summary.en: UpLabs is a marketplace for designers and developers to find and share resources for apps and sites.
summary.zh: UpLabs 是一個讓設計師與開發者尋找並分享應用與網站資源的市集。

highlight.en: Its community uploads new, curated, quality resources every day for designers and developers building apps and websites.
highlight.zh: 其社群每天上傳經精選的優質資源，供建構應用與網站的設計師與開發者使用。

summary.en: SHRI works with communities in India to end open defecation as a step toward health equity.
summary.zh: SHRI 與印度社區合作，終結露天排便，作為邁向健康平等的一步。

highlight.en: SHRI built a toilet that converts waste into methane to power a water filtration system, then sells the clean water locally to keep it sustainable.
highlight.zh: SHRI 打造能將排泄物轉化為甲烷的廁所，以驅動淨水系統，再於當地販售乾淨飲水，使整套系統得以永續運作。

summary.en: Unnyhog is a video game development company creating unique games.
summary.zh: Unnyhog 是一家開發獨特遊戲的電子遊戲公司。

highlight.en: A global studio with four released titles, its latest, UnnyWorld, is a fantasy MMO with gesture controls designed to unite mobile and PC players.
highlight.zh: 這家全球工作室已推出四款遊戲，最新作 UnnyWorld 是一款支援手勢操作的奇幻 MMO，旨在連結手機與 PC 玩家。

summary.en: Perlara is building a model akin to YC for rare disease families pursuing drug discovery.
summary.zh: Perlara 正為投入藥物探索的罕見疾病家庭，打造類似 YC 的模式。

highlight.en: It ran PerlQuests screening gene-edited patient avatars for repurposable drugs, later launching trials at Mayo Clinic for PMM2-CDG and NGLY1-CDDG.
highlight.zh: 它推動 PerlQuests，篩選經基因編輯的病患替身以尋找可重新利用的藥物，後於 Mayo Clinic 啟動 PMM2-CDG 與 NGLY1-CDDG 的臨床試驗。

summary.en: Yardbook is a marketplace and software platform for running yard care and landscaping businesses.
summary.zh: Yardbook 是一個用於經營庭園養護與景觀事業的市集與軟體平台。

highlight.en: Its free end-to-end software handles schedules, estimates, invoices, payments and timesheets, and powers over 7,000 US landscaping businesses.
highlight.zh: 其免費的端到端軟體處理排程、估價、發票、收款與工時表，並驅動逾 7,000 家美國景觀業者。

summary.en: Emburse is an expense management and accounts-payable automation platform.
summary.zh: Emburse 是一個費用管理與應付帳款自動化平台。

highlight.en: It gives businesses more insight and control over corporate spend, letting them issue virtual or physical Mastercard expense cards for pre-approved purchases.
highlight.zh: 它讓企業對公司支出有更多洞察與掌控，可發放虛擬或實體的 Mastercard 費用卡，用於預先核准的採購。

summary.en: Redspread provided version control for software environments from development to production.
summary.zh: Redspread 為從開發到生產的軟體環境提供版本控制。

highlight.en: Launched in 2015 in San Francisco, this collaborative deployment tool let teams deploy Docker projects to a Kubernetes cluster with a single command.
highlight.zh: 2015 年於舊金山推出，這款協作部署工具讓團隊以單一指令將 Docker 專案部署到 Kubernetes 叢集。

summary.en: Silver builds a low-cost consumer device for instant toxin and contaminant detection.
summary.zh: Silver 打造低成本的消費級裝置，用於即時偵測毒素與污染物。

highlight.en: It is building the world's first miniaturized Raman spectroscope for consumers, which with proprietary nanoparticle substrates detects contaminants instantly.
highlight.zh: 它正打造全球首款消費級的微型拉曼光譜儀，搭配專利奈米粒子基板，可瞬間偵測多種污染物。

summary.en: Protonet provides the easiest way for a small business to run its own server.
summary.zh: Protonet 為小型企業提供最簡便的方式來架設自己的伺服器。

highlight.en: Protonet focuses on making self-hosted servers simple enough for any small business to run on its own.
highlight.zh: Protonet 致力於讓自架伺服器變得足夠簡單，使任何小型企業都能自行運行。

summary.en: AmberBox is an advanced indoor gunshot detection and response system used in the US.
summary.zh: AmberBox 是一套先進的室內槍聲偵測與應變系統，已在美國使用。

highlight.en: Using tri-factor authentication of percussion, audio and infrared, its patented algorithm identifies a firearm signature with a near-zero false alarm rate.
highlight.zh: 運用震波、聲音與紅外線的三重驗證，其專利演算法以近乎零的誤報率辨識槍械特徵，並通知第一線應變人員。
